ssml_content: <speak><prosody rate="fast">Did you know Einstein was entirely wrong about relativity? Time doesn't bend near a supermassive black hole; it bends right in front of your kitchen <emphasis level="strong">microwave</emphasis>.</prosody> One minute in normal human time is just sixty fleeting seconds. But one minute on a glowing microwave display? <break time="1s"/> That is an absolute geological era. You can rethink every single life choice, contemplate the universe, and age a decade while just watching that leftover cheese slowly melt. <break time="2s"/> <prosody rate="slow">What is the absolute longest microwave minute you have ever experienced? Tell me your pain in the comments.</prosody></speak>
